sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Unpacks FP32 matrix elements in testbench order and quantizes each element to signed two's-complement integer format.
sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_elem: Converts one IEEE-754 FP32 value to real, applies Q15 scale quantization with round-to-nearest-even, adds signed zero-point, and wraps to QBW bits.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Computes VLEN by VLEN signed integer GEMM using centered quantized values and INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Converts signed INT32 accumulators back to packed FP32 using the product of Q15 scale_A and scale_B.
